themes.label: Covenant
themes.summary: This chapter points to covenant, promise, oath, inheritance, or the enduring faithfulness of God. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 9 verses. Commentary leans on "Neither with you only do I make this covenant and this oath. The covenant extends beyond thos...". Cross references echo "Covenant".

themes.label: Creation

Commentary leans on "And we took their land, and gave it for an inheritance unto the Reubenites, and to the Gadite...". Word-study detail reinforces "הָאָ֤רֶץ: land - the earth (at large, or partitively a land)".
